name: @vaipakam/www
description: Vaipakam marketing + docs Vite SPA — vaipakam.com (apex, canonical) with www.vaipakam.com 301-redirecting to apex via a Cloudflare Bulk Redirect rule. NO wallet connect, NO wagmi, NO on-chain reads — pure marketing surface populated by a literal copy of the marketing-side files from apps/defi (Landing, BuyVPFIMarketing, Whitepaper, Overview, UserGuide, Terms, Privacy, DataRights, Discord, HelpSearch). Public-read tools that live on the connected-app domain by industry convention (analytics, NFT verifier, protocol console) are linked out via `defiUrl()` rather than duplicated here. Hosted as a Cloudflare Workers Static Assets deploy on the same shape apps/defi uses, but with a tighter dependency surface (no connectkit, no wagmi, no react-query, no per-action permissioning). Folder, package name, Worker name were all switched together at the labs → www cutover (folder apps/labs → apps/www; package @vaipakam/labs → @vaipakam/www; Worker vaipakam-labs → vaipakam-www).
